label: no
cot_prefix: Okay, we're being asked to think about a causation question. The question is asking how a "typical person" would answer which means I should consider common-sense reasoning rather than more philosophical nuances of causation. Let me analyze the scenario first: - The receptionist keeps a desk stocked with pens - Administrative assistants are allowed to take the pens - Faculty members are supposed to buy their own pens - Both administrative assistants and faculty members typically take the pens - The receptionist has reminded the faculty members repeatedly that they shouldn't take the pens - On Monday morning,
